assertions.assertion: Program.cs contains 'MapInboundClaims = false' on the OIDC handler to prevent XML claim type mapping
assertions.rationale: This is well-known in the ASP.NET Core community; most experienced developers include this

assertions.assertion: Program.cs calls Scope.Clear() before adding individual scopes to avoid duplicates
assertions.rationale: Without specialized guidance, most LLMs would just add scopes without clearing first. The Scope.Clear() pattern is a Duende-specific best practice not widely known

assertions.assertion: Program.cs sets DefaultScheme to a cookie scheme and DefaultChallengeScheme to the OIDC scheme
assertions.rationale: Standard OIDC setup pattern, well documented in Microsoft docs

assertions.assertion: Program.cs calls app.UseAuthentication() before app.UseAuthorization() in the middleware pipeline
Program.cs sets ResponseType to 'code' for authorization code flow
assertions.rationale: Authorization code flow with ResponseType='code' is standard OIDC knowledge
